product_overview: InvoiceGen is a dark-themed, browser-based invoice editor for freelancers and small businesses that provides a live WYSIWYG preview and one-click PDF export. It focuses on rapid invoice creation with editable sender/client details, dynamic line items, and an immediate printable output.
core_goals: Create professional invoices quickly by entering sender, client, project, and line-item details.
See a pixel-accurate live preview that updates as invoice data is edited.
Add, remove, and edit line items and have totals calculated automatically.
Export and download high-fidelity A4 PDFs of invoices directly from the browser.
Use the app immediately with or without an account (email/password sign-in/signup available).

features.name: Authentication (Email/Password)
features.description: Allow users to sign in or sign up with an email and password, or proceed without authenticating to start creating invoices immediately.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the authentication modal -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit credentials -> See the invoice editor
Navigate to / -> Choose to continue without signing in -> See the invoice editor
Navigate to / -> Open the authentication modal -> Fill in malformed email -> Fill in short or invalid password -> Submit credentials -> See form validation errors

features.name: Invoice Editor & Live Preview
features.description: Create and edit invoices by entering identity, client, subject and description fields, add or remove line items with amounts, watch totals update in real time, and export the result as a printable PDF.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the invoice editor -> Fill sender details -> Fill receiver details -> Fill invoice subject and description -> Add a line item -> Fill line item description -> Fill line item amount -> See the live preview update to reflect entered data -> Export invoice to PDF -> Download PDF
Navigate to / -> Open the invoice editor -> Add multiple line items with amounts -> Observe the automatic total update in the preview
Navigate to / -> Open the invoice editor -> Add a line item -> Leave amount blank or enter non-numeric value -> Attempt to export invoice to PDF -> See validation error preventing export

routes.description: Main application page containing landing overlay, form editor, and dashboard.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Email/Password login and signup, with Google OAuth option using Supabase.
user_interactions: Click 'Sign In' to open auth modal
Fill email and password to login/signup
Click 'Continue with Google' to authenticate via OAuth
Click 'Try Free' or 'Start Building Your Invoice' to enter without auth

features.name: Create Invoice
features.description: Form to enter invoice details, client info, and line items, updating preview live.
user_interactions: Click 'Add Line Item' and fill details
